summary: Sprint Contract grep checks pass and TypeScript/build pass after workspace dependencies are installed. Revision is required because PATCH /api/participants/:id/industry is not implemented as a single atomic update covering joined active session, token match, confirmed check, taxonomy validation, and update.

checks.name: 부팅 가드 함수 시그니처 및 서버 호출
evidence: server/src/index.ts calls assertSameSupabaseProject(), validateCriteriaWeights(), computeCriteriaHash(), computeQuestionsBankHash(), and binds NullSttProvider

checks.name: PATCH /industry atomic update
evidence: server/src/routes/participants.ts performs a SELECT at lines 91-95, then validates token/session/confirmed/taxonomy in application code, then performs UPDATE at lines 127-137.

The UPDATE only constrains id, join_token, and industry_confirmed=false. It does not join/check active session status in the same statement and does not detect zero updated rows for a concurrent already_confirmed transition.
This leaves a race where session closure or participant confirmation after the SELECT can still produce a 200 response or stale update behavior, violating §C's single atomic UPDATE SQL requirement.
checks.required_revision: Move the participant/session status/token/confirmed checks that affect write eligibility into a single atomic database update path, or use an RPC/SQL statement with explicit row-count/error mapping for 410 and 409 race cases.

checks.name: TypeScript 컴파일
checks.note: Direct bare tsc failed before PATH adjustment because workspace node_modules/.bin was not in the non-npm shell PATH. The same compiler passes when resolved from workspace dependencies.

checks.name: joinToken 소실 시나리오
checks.evidence: client/src/pages/IndustrySelectPage.tsx redirects to /join?code=:code when localStorage token is missing, and shows an inline closed-session message when GET /api/sessions/:code returns 410.

checks.name: Out of Scope / 기타 스캔
evidence: No Gemini API call, interview_attempts table, real STT implementation, report, dashboard, or Zustand usage found in client/src, server/src, or supabase.
No baseUrl usage found in client/server tsconfig files.
Component/page/function file length spot check stayed below project limits for inspected files.

checks.name: SENTINEL-SPEC.md availability
checks.evidence: qa/ao-logs/SENTINEL-SPEC.md was not present in either /home/claude/job-interview or the detached evaluation worktree. Existing round1 sentinel JSON shape was followed.
